creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text:
The merge-in-editor feature of freebsd-update's merge tool is quite good.  It does, however, lack important features:

- side-by-side chunk-wise change selection without using an editor
- option to outright replace the old file with the new file
- option to retain the old file entirely

These features are present in mergemaster.  Freebsd-update's merge tool is a significant regression.
